steps.title: Compare the table values
steps.content: The blank must accurately compare the tribes' economic contribution with arts, entertainment, and recreation and with professional services. The table shows the tribes' contribution falls between those two industries.

steps.title: Keep the matching comparison
steps.content: A wrongly says the tribes exceeded professional services and equaled arts, entertainment, and recreation. B wrongly says the tribes exceeded both. C wrongly says the tribes were lower than both. The accurate comparison is higher than arts, entertainment, and recreation but lower than professional services. The answer is D.
